rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_text: Above the balustrade level, a maximum 200mm high top fascia panel (at ceiling height above the first floor level) is permitted.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_text: Advertisements upon awnings or verandahs are to comply with Part 16 of the DCP, which relates to Outdoor Advertising.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_text: Balcony signage is to be limited to a fixed panel, maximum 400mm high (measured from the underside of the awning, verandah or balcony).
rules.applies_to: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_text: No advertisements painted or otherwise, are to be located upon any blinds, glass panels or the top balcony fascia.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_text: Awnings, verandahs and balconies must be architecturally complementary to the buildings to which they are attached. Design elements should complement period architecture.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_text: Columns, balustrades and roof designs should be in character with the building. Where necessary, historical photographs or drawings will be used for reference purposes.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_text: The use of any balcony under this DCP is limited to “outdoor” dining, bar seating, commercial activities or the like. The balcony area however is not to be used for entertainment (i.e. locating bands or performers) and storage purposes.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_text: Music or other noise from within the premises must not be intentionally or unduly emitted to the street from the balcony area.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_text: The use of Council Land for commercial activities will require separate approval under Council’s _Street and Outdoor Activities Policy_ and an annual rental fee will be indexed in accordance with the _AlburyCity Council Annual Fees and Charges Booklet._
rules.applies_to: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_text: The applicant will be required to take out an annual licence with Council under the _Roads Act, 1993_ for any structure that encroaches over Council’s Land. The rental fee will be indexed on an annual basis in accordance with Council’s _Licence Agreement – Encroaching Structures_ .
rules.applies_to: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_text: Applicants will be required to hold $20 million public liability insurance for any balcony or structure that encroaches on Council’s Land and must provide a copy of the Certificate of Currency prior to an annual licence being granted by Council. The Lavington CBD is quite diverse in nature and is accordingly comprised of the following 3 precincts: | CBD Fringe. | Supporting CBD Precinct (Wagga and Urana Roads). | The Retail Core. | These precincts will help define roles for each part of the CBD and concentrate on stimulating development in the Retail Core. This will encourage Griffith Road to develop as a main street to become the premier street in Lavington for businesses such as medical centres, banks etc. Likewise, the Supporting CBD Precinct provides for other uses that support the Retail Core. These uses include factory outlets that have a shopfront, residential and seniors living. On the other hand the CBD Fringe plays an important role for destination retail uses and the precinct controls and accommodates for these uses whilst promoting better built form outcomes. Refer to Figure 11.14 for the Lavington CBD Precincts Plan.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_text: To promote a variety of uses within the CBD that increases its role as a regional retail, commercial and civic centre, while encouraging an active, liveable centre for all ages.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_text: To encourage where possible mixed use buildings that operate during the day and night.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_text: To enhance and augment the cultural and civic uses centred around the Lavington Town Square.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_text: Promote incremental change of fringe areas of the CBD that support the Core and respect adjoining residential properties.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_text: To consolidate the retail and commercial functions of the Lavington CBD.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_text: To provide Precinct based planning controls.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_text: Land uses are to comply with the Land Use Table contained within the LEP.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_text: Any form of residential development, shall comply with Part 10 of this DCP, which relates to Development in Residential Zones.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_text: Mixed-use developments shall provide retail and commercial uses at ground level and residential uses above this.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_text: Land uses within the CBD Fringe Precinct shall: Encourage destination retail uses with good exposure to a major Road in Wagga Road, and easy car access to ensure that the Lavington CBD remains competitive with other shopping destinations. | Encourage retail, bulky goods, car yards, workshops and storage facilities within this Precinct.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_text: Land uses within the Supporting CBD Precinct shall: Encourage uses that support the Retail Core of the CBD. This can include factory outlets, bulky goods premises and showrooms, plus residential and seniors housing developments.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_text: Land uses within the Retail Core Precinct shall: Encourage primary retail uses that contribute to a vibrant Core such as café’s, restaurants, entertainment uses, shop front commercial, office and professional services. | Encourage shop top housing and mixed use residential developments to be located above ground floor level in the Retail Core. | Reinforce existing active retail along Mate Street and Urana Road, South of Sanders Street. | Encourage retail and commercial uses on Griffith Road, with community uses concentrated around the proposed Lavington Town Square.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_text: To ensure the height of buildings protect the amenity of neighbouring properties in terms of visual bulk, access to sunlight and privacy.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_text: To nominate heights that will provide a transition in built form between varying land use intensities.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_text: To stimulate redevelopment in the Retail Core.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_text: To allow additional building heights for key sites that deliver public benefit in the form of through site links, public car parking or open spaces.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_text: To allow additional building heights for landmark and opportunity sites (see Figure 11.20) that spatially define the new Lavington Town Square and 5 ways that improve the identity of the Lavington CBD.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_text: Building heights are to comply with the Building Height Plan contained in Figure 11.15.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_text: If development is adjacent to residential uses then building heights shall ‘step down’ to 2 storeys to protect the amenity of adjoining houses.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_text: A maximum 3 storey building height is permitted along Wagga Road.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_text: Infill residential developments shall have a maximum building height of 2 storeys.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_text: In the Retail Core, buildings adjacent to residential development shall have a maximum height of 3 storeys to the rear.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_text: Landmark sites shall have a maximum height of 7 storeys with the exception of the Telstra Building (maximum 5 storeys) and the Council car park site (maximum 12 storeys).
rules.applies_to: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_text: Opportunity sites have a maximum height of 7 storeys. Clause 4.3 of the LEP stipulates the Height of Buildings requirements and the LEP Height of Buildings Map spatially depicts the designated heights.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.section: 11.7.23 Street Wall Heights and Upper Level Setbacks - Lavington
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_text: To maintain and improve the scale of streets as incremental change occurs.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.section: 11.7.23 Street Wall Heights and Upper Level Setbacks - Lavington
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_text: To protect the amenity of established residential areas.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.section: 11.7.23 Street Wall Heights and Upper Level Setbacks - Lavington
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_text: Street wall heights shall comply with the Street Wall Height Plan contained within Figure 11.16.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.section: 11.7.23 Street Wall Heights and Upper Level Setbacks - Lavington
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_text: Street wall heights and Upper level setbacks in the Retail Core are required to achieve the following heights: Minimum of 3 metre upper level setback for buildings that have an overall building height that exceeds the street wall height. | Maximum street wall height of 3 storeys plus parapet. | An upper level setback of 3 metres from the street wall for 5 storey buildings.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_text: To ensure that the density, bulk and scale of development is appropriate for a site and integrates with the streetscape and character of the area in which the development is located.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_text: To encourage lot consolidation to promote the efficient location of buildings and the minimisation of building bulk.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_text: To stimulate development in specific locations that will improve the liveability of the Lavington CBD.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_text: To allow additional FSRs for landmark and opportunity sites (see Figure 11.20) that spatially define the new Lavington Town Square and 5 ways that improve the identity of the Lavington CBD.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_text: Floor Space Ratios shall comply with the FSR Plan contained within Figure 11.17.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_text: The CBD Fringe Precinct has a maximum FSR of 0.5:1.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_text: The Retail Core Precinct has a maximum FSR of 2:1 for sites that can achieve a minimum site frontage of 24 metres.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_text: The Supporting CBD Precinct has a maximum FSR of 1:1 for sites for infill commercial and retail buildings and a maximum FSR of 0.5:1 for houses.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_text: Sites over 5,000m[2] requiring a Masterplan have a base FSR of 0.5:1.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_text: When public benefits are delivered on sites located within the Retail Core and Supporting CBD Precinct, the following FSR bonuses apply: 0.5:1 FSR for sites between 5000m[2] - 15,000m[2] .
rules.applies_to: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_text: Landmark sites must comply with the following: Maximum FSR is 2.5:1 for these sites with the exception of Council’s car park site and the landmark building located on the Coles site. | No FSR’s will be determined for landmark buildings located on sites over 5,000m[2] that require a Masterplan. These sites require a merit assessment in keeping with the intent and principles of the _Lavington CBD Masterplan, 2009._ | Council’s car park site can achieve a maximum FSR of 3:1 if it provides a public forecourt, through site links and public parking.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_text: Opportunity sites have a maximum FSR of 2.5:1 provided these sites can achieve: Site amalgamation to achieve Council’s parking requirements, | • Provide public benefits in the form of through site links with active frontages with a minimum 5 metres in width and 7 metres in height when incorporated into a building. The minimum height of 7 metres does not apply if the through site links have a skylight over, with access to natural daylight preferred. | Maximum FSR’s may only be achievable on larger infill sites or consolidated sites over 24 metres in frontage. | FSR’s assume aboveground parking, should underground parking be feasible the FSR’s will be lower to reflect the potential increase in gross floor area within the proposed heights. | Clause 4.4 and 4.5 of the LEP stipulates the Floor Space Ratio requirements and the calculation processes used in determining applications, whilst the LEP Floor Space Ratio Map spatially depicts the designated floor space ratio’s for particular sites. | Requirements relating to building design must be in accordance with Building Design controls contained within Section 11.7.6 of this Part.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_text: To improve the built form and character of Lavington.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_text: To encourage buildings built to the street boundary, which provide better street definition, active frontages and awnings to streets in the Retail Core.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_text: To maintain predominant landscape setbacks on residential streets so as to manage change as it occurs.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_text: Buildings setback within landscaped settings shall provide associated open space and landscaping.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_text: Street wall setbacks and build to lines are to comply with the Street Setback and Build to Lines Plan as contained within Figure 11.18.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_text: Street setbacks where appropriate should follow the predominant setback along the street.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_text: Where there is not a predominant setback (i.e. large sites or where a significant change in building use/type) is present, a 3 metre street setback should be provided.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_text: For additions to residential houses, a minimum side setback of 1.2 metres and minimum rear setback of 6 metres shall apply.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_text: For residential apartments and residential components of mixed-use buildings, the following rear setbacks apply: Minimum 6 metres, where building height is 4 storeys or less. | Minimum 9 metres, where building height is 5 storeys or greater.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_text: For commercial uses with windows facing the front and rear of a lot, a minimum 3 metre side setback applies.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_text: Bulky goods premises may be built to one side and to the rear boundary of a lot, where the adjoining property is not a house, mixeduse development or commercial office building with facing windows.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_text: In the Retail Core Precinct: Buildings are required to be built to the street boundary. | For streetwall building types, adopt party wall construction where it is consistent with the adjacent context.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_text: In the CBD Fringe Precinct Building types such as showrooms/sheds, workshops, bulky goods are required to be built to the street boundary for a minimum of 50% of the site frontage to provide street enclosure and definition. The remaining 50% of the site frontage can be setback to allow for the display of goods and/or customer parking. The part of the site frontage that is setback is required to be landscaped with shrubs and/or trees at the street boundary. | Maintain the predominant landscape setback of Griffith Road in this precinct to ensure that incremental change is sympathetic to the residential character of this part of Griffith Road.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_text: In the CBD Supporting Precinct Building types such as showrooms/sheds, workshops, bulky goods are required to be built to the street boundary for a minimum of 50% of the site frontage to provide street enclosure and definition. The remaining 50% of the site frontage can be setback to allow for the display of goods and/or customer parking. The part of the site frontage that is setback is required to be landscaped with shrubs and/or trees at the street boundary. | Maintain the predominant landscape setback for residential development on Parnall, Breen and Prune Streets. | Requirements relating to Building depth must be in accordance with the controls contained within Section 11.7.8 of this Part. | Building separation requirements will be assessed against _State Environmental Planning Policy No. 65 – Design Quality of Residential Flat Development_ for multi-unit residential or mixed use buildings over 4 storeys tall. | Requirements relating to Open space and landscaping must be in accordance with the controls contained within Section 11.7.10 of this Part. | Requirements relating to Car parking, traffic and access must be in accordance with the controls contained within Section 11.7.11 of this Part.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_text: To encourage and promote a consistent streetscape in terms of building bulk, height, setbacks, street furniture, signage and building designs.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_text: To promote the redevelopment of individual sites and streets for the improvement of the streetscape.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_text: To have regard to established residential streetscapes.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_text: New buildings shall avoid extensive blank walls to street frontages by incorporating display windows and landscaped street setbacks.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_text: In the Supporting CBD Precinct awnings are required for the 50% of the street wall built to the street boundary.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_text: All buildings are required to provide active frontages at ground level. This includes shop fronts, cafes, restaurants, lobbies, showrooms etc.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_text: All buildings are required to provide box awnings with a minimum width of 3 metres at a height consistent to existing adjacent awnings.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_text: Awnings are required for bulky goods building types.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_text: All buildings edging the new Lavington Town Square shall incorporate active edges to increase the vibrancy of this space and to provide opportunities for passive surveillance.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones
rules.rule_text: Where possible, infill development shall occur along Centro’s Griffith Road frontage with active retail uses. Requirements relating to Urban design and pedestrian circulation must be in accordance with the controls contained within Section 11.7.13 of this Part. | Requirements relating to Outdoor Advertising must be in accordance with the requirements contained within Section 11.7.14 of this Part. | Sites or consolidated sites over 5,000m[2] are required to prepare a site specific Masterplan (refer to Figure 11.19 for the spatial extent of these areas). Masterplan sites are subject to merit assessment and are required to demonstrate that the FSR’s are achieved by responding to: | An Economic Impact Report which details floor space and the impacts on existing uses within the CBD. | Details of proposed public benefits such as through site links, open spaces, and/or sustainability initiatives. | The interface between residential, commercial buildings and heritage curtilages. | Requirements relating to awnings, verandahs and balconies must be in accordance with the controls contained within Section 11.7.20 of this Part. | The B5 Business Development Zone in Albury applies to land/s designated for commercial development and uses that: | Do not detract from the viability of the B3 Commercial Core Zones; and | Accommodates commercial uses that would not be appropriate in the B3 Commercial Core Zones. | The B5 Business Development Zone applies to land on the South-West corner of the Fallon and Mate Streets intersection, which has traditionally been zoned and developed for commercial purposes. The zone is surrounded by low-density residential development and, in this context, future commercial within the zone must incorporate design and landscaping features that contribute to maintaining and enhancing residential amenity on these adjoining lands.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B3 Commercial Core And B4 Mixed Use Zones

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B5 Business Development Zone
rules.section: 11.8.1 Building Envelope – B5 Business Development Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B5 Business Development Zone
rules.rule_text: To ensure consistency with the building heights of adjoining lowdensity residential development.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B5 Business Development Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B5 Business Development Zone
rules.section: 11.8.1 Building Envelope – B5 Business Development Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B5 Business Development Zone
rules.rule_text: To enable sufficient space on site to ensure satisfactory space for landscaping.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B5 Business Development Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B5 Business Development Zone
rules.section: 11.8.1 Building Envelope – B5 Business Development Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B5 Business Development Zone
rules.rule_text: To prevent excessive building bulk.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B5 Business Development Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B5 Business Development Zone
rules.section: 11.8.1 Building Envelope – B5 Business Development Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B5 Business Development Zone
rules.rule_text: The maximum building height is 8 metres.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B5 Business Development Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B5 Business Development Zone
rules.section: 11.8.1 Building Envelope – B5 Business Development Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B5 Business Development Zone
rules.rule_text: The minimum setback to the Mate and Fallon Street road reserves is to be consistent with the setbacks required within the adjoining R1 General Residential Zone. Refer to Part 10 of this DCP, which relates to Development in Residential Zones.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B5 Business Development Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B5 Business Development Zone
rules.section: 11.8.1 Building Envelope – B5 Business Development Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B5 Business Development Zone
rules.rule_text: The minimum side setback to adjoining residential land is 6 metres.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B5 Business Development Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B5 Business Development Zone
rules.section: 11.8.1 Building Envelope – B5 Business Development Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B5 Business Development Zone
rules.rule_text: The maximum site coverage for buildings is 60% of the total lot.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B5 Business Development Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B5 Business Development Zone
rules.section: 11.8.1 Building Envelope – B5 Business Development Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B5 Business Development Zone
rules.rule_text: A minimum area of 10% of the total lot is to be retained as soft, pervious or landscaped areas (excluding hard surfaces).
rules.applies_to: Development In The B5 Business Development Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B5 Business Development Zone
rules.section: 11.8.2 Car Parking – B5 Business Development Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B5 Business Development Zone
rules.rule_text: To ensure that developments provide sufficient car parking on the development site.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B5 Business Development Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B5 Business Development Zone
rules.section: 11.8.2 Car Parking – B5 Business Development Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B5 Business Development Zone
rules.rule_text: Future car parking should be concentrated into consolidated off-street locations and accessed primarily from internal circulation streets.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B5 Business Development Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B5 Business Development Zone
rules.section: 11.8.2 Car Parking – B5 Business Development Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B5 Business Development Zone
rules.rule_text: Future car parking shall be provided in a coordinated manner, for each component land use and in accordance with the standards and rates outlined in Part 17 of this DCP, which relates to Off Street Car Parking.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B5 Business Development Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B5 Business Development Zone
rules.section: 11.8.3 Development within Proximity to the R1 General Residential Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B5 Business Development Zone
rules.rule_text: To ensure the level of residential amenity of adjoining residential land is maintained and enhanced through future redevelopment.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B5 Business Development Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B5 Business Development Zone
rules.section: 11.8.3 Development within Proximity to the R1 General Residential Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B5 Business Development Zone
rules.rule_text: Development within the B5 Business Development Zone is to address the following matters to the satisfaction of Council: The relative building scale, bulk, design and height and the siting of the proposed development. | The retention of acoustic and visual privacy of residents of properties in the R1 General Residential Zone, including the incorporation of landscaping buffers within the setbacks to these adjoining properties. | The hours of operation of the proposed development. | Levels of traffic generation of the proposed development. | Any noise, light, dust and odour nuisance likely to be generated by the proposed development. | Over-shadowing of, and retention of solar access by, properties in Residential Zones. The siting and design of buildings within the proposed development shall allow for reasonable solar access to adjoining buildings, streets and places. | Albury contains a B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone, located on the Riverina Highway in East Albury, within proximity to the Albury Airport. Its location at this eastern gateway to the city provides an important strategic and visually prominent entry point to the central Albury area for highway related vehicular traffic, as well as, arrivals from the Albury Airport. The B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone also adjoins an existing R1 General Residential Zone to the immediate west. Accordingly, the intent of the zone is to promote commercial development that does not detract from the functions of the predominant Central Business Districts of Albury, is visually attractive in design and landscaping and is compatible with the residential uses adjoining these lands.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B5 Business Development Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone
rules.section: 11.9.1 Preferred Land Uses – B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone
rules.rule_text: To ensure the B3 Commercial Core and B4 Mixed Use Zones of the Albury and Lavington CBD’s maintain their primacy as the predominant commercial and retail locations of Albury.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone
rules.section: 11.9.1 Preferred Land Uses – B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone
rules.rule_text: To encourage bulky good and homemaker related businesses to locate within this zone.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone
rules.section: 11.9.1 Preferred Land Uses – B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone
rules.rule_text: Land Use Types shall be bulky goods and homemaker related businesses. Such uses considered appropriate include: • Furniture, bedding and floor covering outlets. ‘Whitegood’ outlets. | Bathroom and Kitchen retailers. | Doors, windows and blind outlets. | Other like bulky good and homemaker businesses.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone
rules.section: 11.9.1 Preferred Land Uses – B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone
rules.rule_text: Land Use Types that Council deems inappropriate within the B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone include: Retail and clothing outlets. | Offices. | Automotive accessories. | Food produce industries. | Sporting equipment and leisure goods. | Toys and game outlets. | Any other land use type that Council considers not bulky goods or homemaker related. | Such uses shall be in accordance with the definition of bulky goods premises in the LEP dictionary.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone
rules.section: 11.9.2 Development within Proximity to the R1 General Residential Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone
rules.rule_text: To ensure the level of residential amenity of adjoining residential land is maintained and enhanced through future redevelopment.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone
rules.section: 11.9.2 Development within Proximity to the R1 General Residential Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone
rules.rule_text: Development within the B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone is to address the following matters to the satisfaction of Council: The relative building scale, bulk, design and height and the siting of the proposed development. | The retention of acoustic and visual privacy of residents of properties in the R1 General Residential Zone, including the incorporation of landscaping buffers within the setbacks to these adjoining properties. | The hours of operation of the proposed development. | Levels of traffic generation of the proposed development. | Any noise, light, dust and odour nuisance likely to be generated by the proposed development. | Over-shadowing of, and retention of solar access by, properties in the R1 General Residential Zone. The siting and design of buildings within the proposed development shall allow for reasonable solar access to adjoining buildings, streets and places.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone
rules.section: 11.9.3 Building Envelope – B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone
rules.rule_text: To ensure consistency with the building heights of adjoining lowdensity residential developments.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone
rules.section: 11.9.3 Building Envelope – B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone
rules.rule_text: To enable sufficient space on site for high quality landscaping.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone
rules.section: 11.9.3 Building Envelope – B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone
rules.rule_text: To prevent excessive building bulk.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone
rules.section: 11.9.3 Building Envelope – B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone
rules.rule_text: The maximum building height is 8 metres. _Building Setbacks_
rules.applies_to: Development In The B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone
rules.section: 11.9.3 Building Envelope – B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone
rules.rule_text: The minimum setback to the Riverina Highway road reserve and any other internal roads created 8 metres.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone
rules.section: 11.9.3 Building Envelope – B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone
rules.rule_text: The minimum side setback is 4 metres.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone
rules.section: 11.9.3 Building Envelope – B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone
rules.rule_text: The maximum site coverage for buildings is 50% of the total lot.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone
rules.section: 11.9.3 Building Envelope – B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone
rules.rule_text: A minimum area of 30% of the total lot is to be retained as soft, pervious or landscaped areas (excluding hard surfaces).
rules.applies_to: Development In The B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone
rules.section: 11.9.4 Car Parking – B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone
rules.rule_text: To ensure that developments provide sufficient car parking on the development site.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone
rules.section: 11.9.4 Car Parking – B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone
rules.rule_text: Future car parking should be concentrated into consolidated off-street locations and accessed primarily from internal circulation streets.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone
rules.section: 11.9.4 Car Parking – B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone
rules.rule_text: Future car parking shall be provided in a coordinated manner, for each component land use and in accordance with the standards and rates outlined in Part 17 of this DCP, which relates to Off Street Car Parking.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone
rules.section: 11.9.5 Landscaping Requirements – B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone
rules.rule_text: To ensure that development is of a high quality presentation through appropriate landscaping.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone
rules.section: 11.9.5 Landscaping Requirements – B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone
rules.rule_text: Development in the B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone is to incorporate the following: The planting of vegetation. | Screening of the bulk of the buildings when viewed from the adjoining land uses, where relevant.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone
rules.section: 11.9.5 Landscaping Requirements – B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone
rules.rule_text: All non-residential development in the zone is to be accompanied with a detailed landscape plan, excluding development that, in the opinion of the Council, consists of minor additions and alterations to an existing building.  The landscaping plans should address the following as a minimum: The location, size and species of existing vegetation to be affected by the development, including trees, hedges, large shrubs, shrub beds and any areas of natural vegetation. | Replacement planting for any vegetation which is proposed to be removed. | A planting plan showing the location and expected size within 10 years of each tree and large shrub. | A schedule (table) indicating the common name, botanic name, expected ultimate height and width and planting size (pot size and height), if relying on planting of trees or large shrubs for privacy. | A planting plan showing location and indicative planting for mid/low shrubs and ground covers. | Refer to Appendix A of this DCP, which relates to Information Requirements for Applications, in particular landscape plans. | The B7 Business Park Zone applies to land located on the northern outskirts of the City and is identified within the Albury Land Use Strategy as having an important strategic role as a transport interchange and employment generator for the City. Like the B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone, this site requires the creation of a well-designed and highly attractive development as it is highly visible from a key road entry point to Albury.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B6 Enterprise Corridor Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.section: 11.10.1 Services and Infrastructure – B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_text: To provide the Zone with the full range of services and infrastructure necessary to cater for the needs of the preferred types of land uses.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.section: 11.10.1 Services and Infrastructure – B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_text: Reticulated water and sewerage, underground power and telecommunication facilities shall be provided by the applicant as part of any subdivision.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.section: 11.10.1 Services and Infrastructure – B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_text: Services shall be designed to accommodate the range of preferred land uses and the full development of the Zone.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.section: 11.10.1 Services and Infrastructure – B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_text: All wastes generated from the site shall be removed and disposed in accordance with the requirements of the consent authority and if necessary, the EPA.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.section: 11.10.2 Preferred Land Uses – B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_text: To attract ‘clean’ industries which have a low impact on the amenity of the surrounding area.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.section: 11.10.2 Preferred Land Uses – B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_text: Land use and development shall be consistent with the objectives of the B7 Business Park Zone in the LEP.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.section: 11.10.2 Preferred Land Uses – B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_text: Land use and development shall be consistent with the objectives of any Outline Development Plan prepared for the zone.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.section: 11.10.2 Preferred Land Uses – B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_text: Offensive and hazardous industries are prohibited by the LEP.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.section: 11.10.2 Preferred Land Uses – B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_text: Retail land uses and development shall only be granted consent where they are ancillary to the principal use of the site or principally servicing other activities in the Zone.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.section: 11.10.2 Preferred Land Uses – B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_text: In considering all other development , Council shall only grant consent if it is satisfied that  it will not impact negatively on other activities being undertaken in the Zone, or that it will not prejudice the likelihood of attracting other ‘clean’ industries to the Zone.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.section: 11.10.2 Preferred Land Uses – B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_text: In considering all other development, Council shall only grant consent if it is satisfied that  it will not impact negatively on the amenity of residents opposite or the Ettamogah Sanctuary (e.g. hours of operation, noise, odour, appearance etc.).
rules.applies_to: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.section: 11.10.3 Building Envelopes – B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_text: To ensure that buildings are sited to provide sufficient area for landscaping, car parking and separation from adjoining land uses.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.section: 11.10.3 Building Envelopes – B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_text: Buildings shall not occupy more than 50% of the site area.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.section: 11.10.3 Building Envelopes – B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_text: Buildings shall be located at least: 20 metres from a watercourse. | 10 metres from the front boundary of the property. | 3 metres from side boundaries. | 50 metres from the Ettamogah Sanctuary. | 15 metres from the boundary with the railway reserve.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.section: 11.10.4 Building Design – B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_text: To present an image for the zone of ‘clean’ industry through buildings of appropriate scale, construction materials, colours and energy efficiency.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.section: 11.10.4 Building Design – B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_text: Development shall avoid the use of metal cladding (including colorbond) for walls of buildings, unless utilised as an architectural element in the design.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.section: 11.10.4 Building Design – B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_text: Development shall avoid ‘box-style’ industrial buildings.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.section: 11.10.4 Building Design – B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_text: Development shall take into account the siting and design of adjoining buildings (if any).
rules.applies_to: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.section: 11.10.4 Building Design – B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_text: Development shall avoid large expanses of uninterrupted walls in favour of alternative building materials or treatment of the wall with architectural features.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.section: 11.10.4 Building Design – B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_text: The front facades of buildings shall be designed in a manner that provides interest to the streetscape.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.section: 11.10.4 Building Design – B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_text: Development shall use colours which complement or highlight the style of the building.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.section: 11.10.4 Building Design – B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_text: The use of large areas of glass or other reflective material will only be permitted where glare is not created as a result.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.section: 11.10.4 Building Design – B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_text: Buildings shall be designed and located so that no fencing is necessary forward of the building façade.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.section: 11.10.4 Building Design – B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_text: Buildings should be oriented to make appropriate use of solar energy, be sited and designed so that the energy efficiency of existing buildings are not unreasonably reduced.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.section: 11.10.4 Building Design – B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_text: Developments should be designed so that solar access to north facing windows is maximised.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.section: 11.10.4 Building Design – B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_text: Buildings should be articulated with appropriate vertical and horizontal variations to ensure an appropriate year round variation of shade and sunlight according to the heating/cooling needs and shadow patterns across glazed surfaces during seasonal changes through the year.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.section: 11.10.4 Building Design – B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_text: Buildings should be constructed of materials and using designs which improve thermal mass.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.section: 11.10.4 Building Design – B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_text: Buildings should provide for natural cross-ventilation.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.section: 11.10.4 Building Design – B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_text: Development shall have regard to the Hume Highway and its role as the northern entrance to Albury-Wodonga at this location.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.section: 11.10.5 Landscaping Requirements – B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_text: To enhance the appearance of the zone and northern entrance to Albury-Wodonga along the Hume Highway and Great Southern Railway.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.section: 11.10.5 Landscaping Requirements – B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_text: A minimum of 15% of any lot shall be dedicated to landscaping.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.section: 11.10.5 Landscaping Requirements – B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_text: A minimum of 4 metres from the front boundary and 6 metres from the rear boundary for the width of the property (excluding driveways), shall be dedicated to landscaping.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.section: 11.10.5 Landscaping Requirements – B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_text: A minimum of 2 metres along the sides of the lot shall be dedicated to landscaping.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.section: 11.10.5 Landscaping Requirements – B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_text: Landscaped ‘screens’ shall be provided to outdoor storage areas, fences or undesirable visual aspects of the building (e.g. loading bays).
rules.applies_to: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.section: 11.10.5 Landscaping Requirements – B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_text: Shade to outdoor public and employee areas shall be provided.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.section: 11.10.5 Landscaping Requirements – B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_text: The Hume Highway frontage shall be provided with designed landscaping, having regard to its contribution to the visual amenity of road users.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.section: 11.10.5 Landscaping Requirements – B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_text: Landscape islands and bays shall be utilised in large car parking areas.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.section: 11.10.5 Landscaping Requirements – B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_text: Landscaping shall be maintained and enhanced.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.section: 11.10.5 Landscaping Requirements – B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_text: Existing trees shall be retained where possible (including dead specimens if they represent potential native bird habitat).
rules.applies_to: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.section: 11.10.5 Landscaping Requirements – B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_text: Native indigenous species of flora shall be utilised.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_text: To effectively convey a message without intruding on the visual amenity of the surrounding area or affecting the function of the Hume Highway.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B7 Business Park Zone

rules.applies_to: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_text: The number of signs per building and site shall be minimised to avoid clutter and visual confusion.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_text: Signs shall be integrated into the design of buildings.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_text: Signage shall generally be restricted to corporate and/or product identification where appropriate (i.e. restrict general advertising).
rules.applies_to: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_text: The content of signage shall be related to the activity being conducted on the land where it is located.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_text: Billboard type signage shall not be permitted.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B7 Business Park Zone

rules.applies_to: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_text: Signage shall be for the purposes of site and/or building identification rather than promotion.
rules.applies_to: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B7 Business Park Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B7 Business Park Zone

rules.applies_to: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B7 Business Park Zone

rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B7 Business Park Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B7 Business Park Zone

rules.applies_to: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone

rules.development_sub_category: Development In The B7 Business Park Zone

rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
rules.rule_text: To ensure that development is designed to allow for the safe movement of all vehicles in and around the site, and that the supply of car parking spaces meets the demand generated by the use of the land.

rules.rule_text: Intersections with the Hume Highway shall be upgraded to a standard necessary to accommodate traffic generated by the zone.

rules.rule_group: 11 Development In The B7 Business Park Zone
